{"problem_standardized_math":"Using the Taylor formula\n\\[\nf(x+p)=f(x)+\\nabla f(x)^T p+\\frac{1}{2}p^T\\nabla^2 f(x+tp)p,\n\\quad t\\in(0,1),\n\\]\nwrite the second-order Taylor expansion for the function \\(\\cos(1/x)\\) about a nonzero point \\(x\\), and the third-order Taylor expansion for \\(\\cos(x)\\) about an arbitrary point \\(x\\). Evaluate the latter expansion in the special case \\(x=1\\)."}
